prompt: Compare top open-source CPU LLM inference stacks for weak hardware.
user_goal: Identify the best low-latency CPU inference stack for weak hardware and justify with independent sources.

latest_docs.snippet: Claims stack X is fastest on laptop CPUs without full methodology.

Reports mixed results depending on quantization settings.

known_facts: Contradiction resolved: Y wins with 4-bit quant on weak CPUs

prompt: Summarize legal and pricing differences between two cloud OCR APIs.
user_goal: Deliver a concise recommendation with legal constraints and up-to-date pricing.

latest_docs.snippet: API A lists per-1k page pricing tiers.
API B has stricter data retention clauses.
API B has lower volume discount beyond 1M pages.
